title: Create a users table migration with UTC timestamps
prompt: Write an Ecto migration that creates a `users` table with email (not null), name (not null), and UTC timestamps. Also create a unique_index on email in the same migration. Write to priv/repo/migrations/20260411200000_create_users.exs.
tier_rationale: Canonical create_table migration with two correct defaults (utc_datetime, separate unique_index). Easy but catches the common-default failures.
